sentences.arabic: حَجَزْتُ غُرْفَةً مُفْرَدَةً فِي فُنْدُقٍ قَرِيبٍ مِنَ الشَّاطِئِ.
sentences.translation: Rezervisao sam jednokrevetnu sobu u hotelu blizu plaže.
sentences.translationEn: I booked a single room in a hotel near the beach.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا وَصَلْتُ، قَدَّمْتُ هُوِيَّتِي لِمُوَظَّفِ الِاسْتِقْبَالِ.
sentences.translation: Kada sam stigao, pokazao sam ličnu kartu recepcioneru.
sentences.translationEn: When I arrived, I presented my ID to the receptionist.

sentences.arabic: الْغُرْفَةُ وَاسِعَةٌ وَتُطِلُّ عَلَى الْبَحْرِ الْأَزْرَقِ.
sentences.translation: Soba je prostrana i gleda na plavo more.
sentences.translationEn: The room is spacious and overlooks the blue sea.

sentences.arabic: يُوجَدُ فِي الْفُنْدُقِ مَطْعَمٌ كَبِيرٌ يُقَدِّمُ أَطْبَاقًا مَحَلِّيَّةً لَذِيذَةً.
sentences.translation: U hotelu se nalazi veliki restoran koji služi ukusna lokalna jela.
sentences.translationEn: The hotel has a large restaurant that serves delicious local dishes.

sentences.arabic: سَأَبْقَى هُنَا لِمُدَّةِ أُسْبُوعٍ كَامِلٍ لِلِاسْتِرْخَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ovdje ću ostati punih sedam dana radi odmora.
sentences.translationEn: I will stay here for a whole week to relax.
